title: Onboarding - Eula page - Continue
scenario: Verify EULA onboarding flow: user must check agreement box before Continue button becomes active and navigates to Up-to-Date page.
steps: Launch the app for the first time.
Verify the EULA screen displays the agreement text, license/privacy policy links, a blurred Continue button, and animation.
Tap Continue without checking the agreement box (should do nothing).
Tap Continue again to navigate to the "Up-to-Date" page.
expected: The "Up-to-Date" page is displayed with update messaging, a Skip button, and animation.
